description: Permits child webviews opened by the pkg-browser kernel (labels matching `pkg-*`) to call back into Rust via `__TAURI_INTERNALS__.invoke`. The only command they need to reach is `iyke_browser_reply`, which is gated by a 122-bit oneshot_token per request — partner-site JS cannot spoof an in-flight reply. `remote.urls` is wide-open because the pkg-browser mounts arbitrary partner portals (Spotify-for-Artists, Bandcamp, Linkfire, accounts.google.com, etc.); narrowing it would require redeploying the shell every time a pkg adds a new partner.
